Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=400}

Run.Text: Moving onto Map Controls, a very important tool is your Tactical Display at the bottom left. You can move the map by clicking with left mouse button and dragging. Use the scrollwheel to zoom in and out.
If you need to recenter the minimap on the unit you are spectating, hit C.
If you wish to move the Tactical Display around the game window, click and drag its title bar. You can also resize it by clicking and dragging the boundaries of the Tactical Display window.
